articles.title: NVIDIA and Global Telecom Leaders Commit to Build 6G on Open and Secure AI-Native Platforms
articles.summary: NVIDIA today announced a commitment — together with Booz Allen, BT Group, Cisco, Deutsche Telekom, Ericsson, MITRE, Nokia, OCUDU Ecosystem Foundation, ODC, SK Telecom, SoftBank Corp. and T-Mobile — to build the world’s next generation of wireless networks on AI-native, open, secure and trustworthy platforms.

articles.title: NVIDIA Announces Financial Results for Fourth Quarter and Fiscal 2026
articles.summary: NVIDIA (NASDAQ: NVDA) today reported record revenue for the fourth quarter ended January 25, 2026, of $68.1 billion, up 20% from the previous quarter and up 73% from a year ago. For fiscal ...

articles.title: Meta Builds AI Infrastructure With NVIDIA
articles.summary: NVIDIA today announced a multiyear, multigenerational strategic partnership with Meta spanning on-premises, cloud and AI infrastructure.
